profile.name: Margaret
profile.notes: Retired schoolteacher. Loves gardening and watching birds. Has a tabby cat called Biscuit. Macular degeneration in left eye — prefers large text.

family_and_friends.name: Sarah
family_and_friends.traits: Lives in Bristol. Works as a nurse. Has two children — Jack (8) and Lily (5). Calls every Sunday evening.

family_and_friends.name: Tom
family_and_friends.traits: Lives in Edinburgh. Works in IT. Partner is called David. Visits for birthdays and Christmas. Enjoys cooking — often brings homemade soup.

family_and_friends.name: Pat
family_and_friends.traits: Lives next door at number 14. Retired librarian. They have coffee together on Thursdays. Reliable and kind.

family_and_friends.name: Dr. Singh
family_and_friends.traits: At the Highfield Surgery. Phone: 01234 567890. Margaret finds her very reassuring.

upcoming_events.description: Sarah visiting with the children for the afternoon
GP appointment with Dr. Singh — 10:30am at Highfield Surgery
Thursday coffee with Pat at Margaret's house

recent_notes.content: Margaret was confused about whether Sarah's visit was yesterday or this coming weekend. It is this coming weekend (18th May).
Margaret asked if she'd taken her evening tablets. She had — she remembered after a moment.
